summary: Sesi 2026-05-01 dimulai dalam mode stateful dengan fokus logo, bulk CSV, TDD, dan push GitHub.

goals: Logo tidak boleh bergeser ke tone kebiruan.
Semua bulk import CSV harus berjalan lancar.
Push ke GitHub setelah perubahan yang diverifikasi.
initial_risks: Worktree sudah kotor dengan perubahan lokal besar.
Planner dan task memory sebelumnya kosong.

summary: Branding kini diprioritaskan ke asset root yang diberikan user; parser CSV bersama diperkuat untuk multi-encoding dan multi-delimiter.

branding: Template utama sekarang memakai branding_logo_data_uri atau branding_logo_mark_data_uri lebih dulu.
Helper logo memprioritaskan logo_panjang.png/logo_panjang.svg dan logo.png/logo.svg dari root project.
bulk_csv: BulkImportService._read_csv sekarang decode utf-8-sig, utf-8, cp1252, latin-1.
Delimiter dideteksi otomatis untuk koma, titik-koma, pipa, dan tab.
verification_blockers: test_runner_run: pytest tidak ada di PATH dan modul pytest belum terpasang untuk python3.
browser_ui_run_smoke ke http://127.0.0.1:6001/auth/login timeout pada tool.

summary: TDD bulk upload/logo sudah hijau di virtualenv; runtime login kini melayani logo data URI dari asset root.

details.tests: 21 passed, 2 warnings in 4.34s via .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_branding.py tests/test_bulk_import_service.py -q
details.runtime: docker compose build web && up -d web berhasil; fetch /auth/login menunjukkan hero logo, mark, dan favicon berbentuk data:image/png;base64,...
details.browser_smoke_blocker: browser_ui_run_smoke butuh browser Playwright lokal; percobaan install via tool melampaui timeout context runner.

summary: Audit logo kini PNG-only: helper dan template app tidak lagi memakai fallback SVG lama.

details.code_audit: Pencarian referensi SVG logo di folder app menghasilkan nol setelah perubahan.
details.runtime_login: http://127.0.0.1:6001/auth/login setelah rebuild mengirim hero logo, mark logo, dan favicon sebagai data:image/png;base64,...
details.invoice_status: Source template payments/invoice.html dan quota/invoice_print.html kini hanya memakai branding_logo_data_uri. Verifikasi UI invoice end-to-end masih menunggu akses halaman invoice runtime/auth atau browser smoke yang lengkap.

summary: Dokumen cetak kini memakai logo.png: invoice pembayaran, invoice quota, dan slip gaji tidak lagi memakai logo panjang.
Verifikasi live fee slip selesai; halaman print payroll memakai logo.png yang sama persis dengan asset repo.
Logo bawah invoice dihapus dari template payment dan quota; runtime invoice kini hanya menampilkan satu logo header.
Backend WhatsApp bot terpisah selesai dibuat dengan LocalAuth persisten, API sync internal Flask, filter evaluasi tutor, dan pencatatan attendance berbasis tanggal chat grup.

runtime: bot session reaches awaiting_qr with qrDataUrl after initialize
assumptions: reported lesson date kept separately in whatsapp_evaluations

summary: Dashboard manajemen WhatsApp bot kini tersedia di Flask dan sesi QR runtime stabil kembali setelah perbaikan cleanup lock LocalAuth.

runtime_fix: cleanup SingletonLock/Socket/Cookie kini memakai lstatSync agar symlink rusak benar-benar terhapus
failed init/disconnected/auth_failure kini reset client reference dan runtime state
docker-compose whatsapp_bot memakai init: true untuk bantu reap proses zombie Chromium
verification: Hermes test_runner_run: 7 pytest passed + 5 node tests passed
Live authenticated check: /whatsapp/management 200, proxy session awaiting_qr, qrDataUrl present

summary: Log bot WhatsApp menunjukkan crash transien dari whatsapp-web.js/Puppeteer saat auto-logout, lalu recovery ditambahkan dan QR login kini muncul lagi.

root_cause: Execution context was destroyed, most likely because of a navigation
fixes: guard recoverable runtime errors via process unhandledRejection/uncaughtException handler
reset/destroy client and cleanup LocalAuth locks on recoverable failures
dashboard warmup polling added; QR wait hint now explicit 20-30 detik
verification: focused tests: 3 pytest passed + 6 node tests passed
live bot session reaches awaiting_qr with hasQr=true around 9-25 seconds
container restart count stable at 0 after rebuild
dashboard proxy session shows awaiting_qr and qrDataUrl present

summary: WhatsApp bot runtime now avoids client.getMe failure, sync token mismatch is fixed, and contact directory plus tutor suggestions are live.

runtime_fix: state.me now uses client.info identity instead of client.getMe
web container now receives WHATSAPP_BOT_TOKEN so bot sync is no longer rejected 401
data_sync: live sync populated 121 groups, 874 contacts, 1175 memberships, 641 messages, 641 evaluations
suggestions: historical tutor names parsed from evaluation messages now drive tutor suggestions even when WhatsApp contact display names are blank
live sample suggestions found for Dinda and Listya Gandhini
verification: Hermes test_runner_run passed: 10 pytest helper/dashboard assertions + 7 node tests
bot session verified ready with me payload and no lastError

summary: WhatsApp management now supports excluded groups and validating group contacts into Tutor records with group snapshots.
details: Flask ingest and contact directory now exclude configured group names, defaulting to VPS / RDP MURAH III.
Dashboard contact suggestions now expose a Valid button that writes the contact number into Tutor.phone and stores a whatsapp_tutor_validations snapshot.
Node tests passed 9/9, web container pytest passed 13 tests, login browser smoke passed, and /whatsapp/management redirects correctly to login at runtime.
Full docker compose rebuild hit root-disk pressure from build cache; Docker builder cache was pruned and running containers were refreshed for final verification.

summary: WhatsApp contact directory now includes full active tutor list for manual validation per contact.
details: API contact-directory now returns tutors alongside contacts and excluded groups.
Dashboard renders a manual tutor select per contact row plus a validation button.
Hermes verification passed: 14 pytest tests, login smoke ok, WhatsApp health endpoint 200.

summary: Tutor detail 500 fixed by moving payout ordering out of Jinja template into route-level SQLAlchemy query.
details: Root cause from web logs: tutor_detail.html used tutor.payouts.order_by('id desc') which raises SQLAlchemy CompileError on textual ORDER BY.
master.tutor_detail now computes recent_payouts and last_payout with TutorPayout.id.desc().
Regression verified: 16 pytest passed and no repeat of the order_by compile error after web restart.

summary: Tutor detail now shows validated WhatsApp contact and group snapshot for tutors already confirmed from contact directory.
details: master.tutor_detail loads WhatsAppTutorValidation by tutor_id and passes validated_group_memberships plus excluded_group_names to the template.
Tutor detail template renders validated phone, contact name, and a table of group IDs and names.
Hermes verification passed: 16 pytest tests and browser smoke on login remained green.

summary: WhatsApp contact directory now supports student suggestions, full student list, and manual student validation per contact.
details: Added whatsapp_student_validations plus student suggestion helper using contact name, group names, parsed evaluation student names, and phone matches.
API contact-directory now returns students and supports POST /api/contact-directory/validate-student.
Hermes verification passed: 20 pytest tests, browser smoke ok, and WhatsApp health endpoint 200.

summary: Saran siswa dashboard WhatsApp dipindah dari tabel kontak ke tabel daftar group.
Validasi siswa per group kini menyimpan ID dan nama group langsung ke tabel students.
Matching group tutor dan siswa kini otomatis disimpan ke tabel enrollments.
Enrollment WhatsApp matching kini mendukung multi-group untuk satu siswa.

details.matching_behavior: Store all shared groups; first shared group remains primary summary.

summary: Dashboard WhatsApp sekarang DB-first dan refresh memicu scan untuk memperbarui database.

details.refresh_behavior: Refresh Group/Refresh Kontak => /api/sync/groups => reload DB data

summary: Bug 500 di detail tutor berasal dari helper jadwal mengajar baru yang memakai Enrollment tanpa import di app/routes/master.py. Fix: tambahkan Enrollment ke import block dan guard di tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py.

summary: Presensi dari WhatsApp kini discan manual per bulan/tahun dari halaman presensi dengan matching berbasis tutor tervalidasi dan group enrollment.

verification.browser_smoke: /attendance/ redirects to login without 500 after rebuild

summary: Filter evaluasi WhatsApp diperketat supaya kandidat presensi hanya lolos bila struktur laporan tutor lengkap.

required_markers: title pattern laporan evaluasi / evaluation report
guardian greeting or tutor closing identity

summary: Dashboard WhatsApp kini punya scan semua pesan group ke database, count pesan per group, dan dedupe presensi berbasis group id plus nomor tutor pengirim plus tanggal kirim.
WhatsApp full scan now exposes per-group progress state and dashboard progress bar. Duplicate scans update existing messages by whatsapp_message_id while distinct tutor posts remain separate rows.
Attendance editing now supports manual tutor selection independent from enrollment tutor. Linked WhatsApp evaluations resync to the corrected attendance tutor and enrollment.

verification.browser_smoke: /attendance/ redirected to login without 500 after rebuild

summary: WhatsApp management now filters validated and unvalidated rows for both group and contact tables. Students list now supports active/inactive filter plus quick page search, student detail can toggle active state, and student/tutor detail tabs use only the person name as title.

verification.browser_smoke: login page passed after web rebuild

summary: Added WhatsApp validated/unvalidated UI filters, student active/inactive filtering and quick search, student active toggle action, and short tab titles for student/tutor detail pages.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_whatsapp_bot_dashboard.py tests/test_student_views.py tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py -q => 8 passed
details.notes: WhatsApp filters are client-side over DB-backed tables; student quick search filters current page rows only.

summary: Fixed enrollment edit form so student/tutor rate defaults no longer render with trailing .00 that broke IntegerField submission.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_enrollment_form_view.py -q => 2 passed, 2 warnings
details.root_cause: Edit route assigned Numeric(15,2) DB values directly into IntegerField defaults, producing values like 43750.00 in browser inputs.

details.notes: Search is client-side, works together with validated/unvalidated filters and existing pagination.

summary: Fixed tutor detail 500 caused by Jinja iterating day_bucket.items instead of the day bucket items key.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py -q => passed
details.root_cause: Teaching schedule data is a list of dicts; Jinja resolved day_bucket.items to the dict method instead of the items payload.

summary: Added taught-subject summary to tutor detail and a new subject detail page listing tutors who teach the subject.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py tests/test_subject_detail_view.py tests/test_public_id_routes.py -q => passed
details.notes: Summaries combine attendance sessions and enrollment data to avoid losing tutor-subject relationships when one source is sparse.

summary: Tutor/subject detail teaching summaries verified in rebuilt web container.

details.tests: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py tests/test_subject_detail_view.py tests/test_public_id_routes.py -q => 7 passed in 0.09s
details.deploy: hermes deploy_release_execute build web => success on retry; up web => recreated container successfully
details.note: Initial build attempt failed due transient network unreachable to auth.docker.io; retry succeeded.

summary: Added a repo-side Hermes/GitHub sync workflow with version counter and context snapshot export.

details.verification: python3 scripts/hermes_github_sync.py --skip-git => ok, version v0001 created
details.note: Hermes github_required enforcement exists in Hermes project settings, not in repo code. Raw context-mode DB backup is optional via --include-global-context due privacy/scope risk.

summary: Added reusable per-page controls for large paginated tables; options 10/20/25/50/100/250 server-side and client-side selectors for WhatsApp group/contact tables.

Added scripts/provision_new_server.sh for new server migration: clone repo, generate .env.docker secrets, create logs/uploads/backups/whatsapp-auth mounts, build Docker images, start PostgreSQL/web/WhatsApp bot, optional DB/uploads/WA restore, smoke check.

Added WhatsApp bot session management: Node endpoints list auth sessions/backups, create tar.gz backup, restore selected backup with safety pre-restore backup, delete/download backup; Flask proxies and dashboard UI added.
WhatsApp Bot management now displays currentSessionName as active session ID and each auth folder exposes sessionId derived from session-* folder name.
README now includes Migrasi Server & Backup section with scripts/provision_new_server.sh usage and restore examples for DB, uploads, and WhatsApp auth.
WhatsApp evaluation scan improved: parser broadened and group sync coverage displayed.

details.verification: Dashboard pytest 5 passed, WhatsApp bot node --test 16 passed, web/whatsapp_bot containers rebuilt, bot health 200, web management 302 login redirect.
details.caveat: Full sync reports coverage for messages WhatsApp Web exposes to this session; older phone-only history may require phone/web history availability.

summary: Attendance list now has manual crosscheck marker for WhatsApp-scanned presensi from April 2026 onward.

details.verification: 35 related pytest tests passed; web rebuilt; manual_review_* columns verified in runtime DB; login 200 and attendance route 302 protected redirect.
details.business_rule: Manual review status is audit-only and does not affect attendance, payroll, billing, or matching.
